title: [BUG]Named ranges with the same name on different pages - previous ranges will be lost, only the last range will remain (solution present) ))
author: Den2016

comments.author: sunhao12
skypesky
comments.body:
@Den2016 
Are you going to submit a PR for this issue?

comments.author: Stigjb
comments.body:
I think this is a duplicate of #393 

For reference, when there are two defined names with the same name, but with different scopes, this is what it looks like in the underlying OOXML (in xl/workbook.xml):

```xml
<definedNames>
  <definedName name="Foo" localSheetId="0">Sheet1!$A$2</definedName>
  <definedName name="Foo">Sheet1!$A$1</definedName>
</definedNames>
```

Here the first definedName is scoped to the sheet Sheet1, while the second one has global (workbook) scope. In the name manager it looks like this:

![bilde](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/70e04557-7e1a-47b9-8009-400e75dcde70)

comments.author: JesseVelden
